api_gbp_reviews_note: GET /api/gbp/reviews returns 404 Not Found in mi-core server
note: The dedicated /api/gbp/reviews endpoint does not exist in mi-core. Reviews are tracked through the brand intelligence and customer sentiment engines, which aggregate review data from Google Business Profile, Yelp, and other platforms. The review spike scenario (scenario-03) creates automated response workflows when review thresholds are exceeded.
